api_key.description: Oura personal access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Oura API v2 user-collection base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: Optional start_date (YYYY-MM-DD) query filter applied to the daily_sleep/daily_activity/daily_readiness streams. Must be pre-formatted as a date-only string; unlike legacy's start_datetime this bundle does not accept and truncate an RFC3339 timestamp (documented scope narrowing, docs.md Known limits).

end_date.description: Optional end_date (YYYY-MM-DD) query filter applied to the daily_sleep/daily_activity/daily_readiness streams. Must be pre-formatted as a date-only string; see start_date.
